scenarios.name: Garden section renders with correct number of plants matching shipped days
Each plant links to the correct day detail page
Newest plant has accent gold glow via --newest modifier
Plants have aria-label in Title-Date format for screen readers
Plant title attribute matches manifest title or raw date fallback
Garden section is removed from DOM when no shipped days exist
Container wrapper constrains garden to page width
Mobile plants do not shrink and garden overflows horizontally
